design_philosophy: A rugged, frontier-inspired interface mimicking leather, wood, and parchment. High contrast for readability while maintaining deep, warm, immersive gaming aesthetics tailored for RP groups.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mobile-first, 1 column expanding to 3-4 columns (Control Room Grid) for dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Flat solid surfaces with sharp 1px borders (border-[#3E2E21]) to simulate wooden panels. Subtle inner glow instead of heavy drop shadows.

components.buttons: Flat background with 1px border. Primary buttons use #C5A059 background with dark text. Secondary buttons use transparent background with #C5A059 border and text. Hover states must increase brightness.
components.cards: bg-[#261C14] border border-[#3E2E21] rounded-sm. No drop shadows. Use a subtle top inner highlight (border-t border-[#C5A059]/10) for depth.
components.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar for mobile (z-50) with backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#17110C]/90 border-t border-[#3E2E21]. Active tab gets #C5A059 text/icon, inactive gets #9D8C7A.
components.inputs: bg-[#17110C] border border-[#3E2E21] text-[#E5D9C5] rounded-sm focus:border-[#C5A059] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C5A059] transition-all duration-200.
components.tables: Dense layout, border-collapse. Headers use small uppercase tracking-[0.2em]. Rows separated by border-[#3E2E21].

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) and border color lightens to #C5A059/50. Buttons transition background and text color.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Focus rings must be visible (#C5A059) on all interactive elements. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use noise or wood textures with mix-blend-overlay on backgrounds to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton of grids using border-collapse styles to look technical yet rustic.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, slightly rugged feel. Use earthy colors (#C5A059, #9D8C7A) for icons.

images.usage: Use for the login/auth screen background with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70).
Use as a subtle background pattern for empty states or dashboard header area with high transparency (opacity-10 mix-blend-overlay).
Use as a decorative visual in the Treasury ledger screen or as a card thumbnail.
Use in the Group Assets or Multi-Group Switcher screen header.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='inventory-add-button', data-testid='discord-login-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Design mobile-first with a bottom tab navigation for core sections (Dashboard, Inventory, Treasury, Crops). Use a sidebar/header pattern for desktop sizes.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento grid layouts in the dashboard, avoiding rigid Shadcn cards where overlapping or dense layouts are needed.

For complex interactive components like tables, form inputs, dialogs, and tabs, use and heavily customize Shadcn UI to fit the western theme (rounded-sm, solid flat dark backgrounds with subtle borders).
Use pure CSS textures or the provided wood image with mix-blend-overlay to break up the 'digital flatness' of the dark mode.
Ensure all text over images or dark gradients meets APCA contrast guidelines. Never use transparent headers without a backdrop blur or solid scrim.
Ensure the application strictly follows the color palette and typography rules specified, avoiding default Tailwind blues or greys.
